absorption: Aggressive sellers are being absorbed by passive buyers around 61300-61280, indicated by decreasing negative delta while price fails to make new lows.
dom_observation: Sellers are hitting the bids at 61310-61300 but price is not dropping, indicating bid absorption. Ask side liquidity is heavier above 61400.
reasoning: Seller exhaustion and clear bid absorption below the vPOC suggest a high probability of a rotation back up towards the VAH.
